name: logistics carriers managing 5-15 vehicles tool
description: For logistics carriers managing 5-15 vehicles, inconsistent vehicle maintenance tracking causes unexpected breakdowns. We provide a dedicated tool instead of manual logs and spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inconsistent vehicle maintenance tracking leads to unexpected breakdowns.
